ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the weather data was collected */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the city */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloudiness */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Percentage of humidity */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* General weather condition (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the city data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather metric (e.g., Cloudiness, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, client) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information or a longer summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report in bytes */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
